overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from the game Fort Solis, showing a character in a futuristic spacesuit exploring a dimly lit, industrial space station or Mars base interior. The character moves through office corridors and industrial rooms with emergency lighting, eventually interacting with a handheld scanning device at a workbench.

scene_state.functional_zone: small office workspace with desk and lamp

events.description: character stands up from desk and turns to face the room

agents.ego_description: character rises from desk chair and surveys the office space

entered.detail: text reading 'TERRA / FORT SOLIS' displayed on dark background
cluttered workspace with papers and equipment
illuminated desk lamp providing warm light
coffee mug sitting on the desk
vertical binders and books on desk corner

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a title card for 'Fort Solis' before showing the character sitting at a desk in a dimly lit office. The character stands up from the workspace, which features a desk lamp, mug, and binders, preparing to move through the facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: office corridor with green glass partitions

events.description: character moves from private office into corridor with green-tinted glass walls
character approaches the stairwell airlock door at corridor end

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the office corridor toward the stairwell airlock

entered.detail: green-tinted glass walls separating office spaces
tall red metal cabinet with drawers
large circular metal door with 'STAIRWELL' sign above

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an office corridor with green-tinted glass partition walls, passing a red tool cabinet and whiteboard. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches a large airlock door labeled 'STAIRWELL' at the end of the hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial equipment room with red emergency lighting

events.description: character enters room with red emergency lighting, changing from green ambient to red
character approaches workbench with tools and equipment

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial room with red emergency lighting, navigating around equipment

entered.detail: arrays of red warning lights hanging from ceiling
cluttered workbench with tools and equipment

segments.scene_description: Entering a larger industrial room illuminated by red emergency lights, the character moves past server racks and equipment with cables strewn across the floor. The lighting shifts dramatically from green to red as the character approaches a workbench on the far side of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: workbench area with tools and scanning equipment

events.description: character picks up handheld scanner device from workbench
device lights change from red to blue/green indicating success or completion
character raises wrist device to check status display showing warning

agents.ego_description: manipulating a handheld scanner device at the workbench, then checking wrist display

entered.detail: futuristic handheld device with glowing lights
scattered tools and components on workbench
wrist-mounted display showing TERRA warning message

segments.scene_description: At the workbench, the character interacts with a handheld scanning device, manipulating it as its lights change from red to blue. The character then checks a wrist-mounted display showing a warning message from 'TERRA', indicating some system status or alert.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, dimly lit office into a high-tension industrial zone bathed in emergency lighting. It begins with the character rising from a desk cluttered with a lamp and binders, moving away from the workspace and into a corridor defined by green-tinted glass partitions and office equipment. As the character reaches the end of the hallway, the camera follows them through a stairwell airlock and into a cavernous industrial room where the lighting shifts dramatically from green to a stark, pulsing red. The scene then pushes past server racks and tangled cables toward a workbench, where the character manipulates a handheld scanning device that transitions from red to blue light. Finally, the camera focuses on the character's wrist-mounted display as a warning message from Terra appears, signaling a system alert.
